data.name: 69 Ember Hot
data.detailed_description:
69 Ember Hot - Puzzle with visual novel elements in dark fantasy style. Ember is one of the succubus girls who is waiting for fresh souls in hell. She is ready to play with you before sending you to endless suffering.

Features


  • Interactive gallery
  • Atmospheric music
  • Meditative gameplay
  • Sweet demon girl
data.about_the_game:
69 Ember Hot - Puzzle with visual novel elements in dark fantasy style. Ember is one of the succubus girls who is waiting for fresh souls in hell. She is ready to play with you before sending you to endless suffering.

data.short_description: 69 Ember Hot - Puzzle with visual novel elements in dark fantasy style. Ember is one of the succubus girls who is waiting for fresh souls in hell. She is ready to play with you before sending you to endless suffering.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows7, Windows8, Windows10
  • 處理器: Core i3,i5,i7,E3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce GT 820M
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows7, Windows8, Windows10
  • 處理器: Core i3,i5,i7,E3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce GT 820M
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GT 820M
  • 儲存空間: 800 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GT 820M
  • 儲存空間: 800 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
